title: NZ Government Cloud First Policy
description: Mandates that New Zealand government organisations must adopt public cloud services in preference to on-premises ICT infrastructure for information systems. Establishes requirements for data classification, multi-cloud resilience, cost optimisation, risk assessment, and consideration of Māori data perspectives.
